name: TDengine
description: High-performance open-source time-series database by Taos Data for IoT and industrial workloads; 24k+ GitHub stars.

seo.title: TDengine — DBaaS / Serverless Databases
seo.meta_description: TDengine: High-performance open-source time-series database by Taos Data for IoT and industrial workloads; 24k+ GitHub stars.

when_to_use: High-performance IoT time-series database for industrial data
Storing and querying metrics from millions of sensor points
SQL interface for time-series analysis without custom query lang
Edge-to-cloud time-series pipeline with TDengine Edge
Energy and utility monitoring at massive IoT scale

pros: Fast ingest optimized for IoT workloads
SQL-like query language lowers learning curve
cons: Grafana integration functional but not rich
review.verdict: Compelling high-performance time-series DB for IoT, InfluxDB still wins on ecosystem breadth and integrations.
review.best_for: IoT and industrial workloads with massive ingest where compression and speed matter
review.not_for: Teams needing InfluxDB-scale ecosystem and tooling maturity

transparency.reason: Free open source, clear cloud pricing
